case_title: CHANCELLOR HOTEL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF IS AN ENTITY. THIS COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO AWARD IT MORE THAN $5,000.00. SEE CODE CIV PROC 116.220. ON OR BEFORE THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE, PLAINTIFF SHALL EITHER NOTIFY THE COURT THAT IT WAIVES DAMAGES ABOVE $5,000.00 OR SHALL DISMISS THE CASE W/O PREJUDICE. IF PLAINTIFF HAS SUBMITTED A WAIVER BEFORE THE HEARING DATE, NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY IS NECESSARY. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE ITS WAIVER IF ANY ON DEFENDANT BY REGULAR MAIL.
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANCELLOR HOTEL
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF CHANCELLOR HOTEL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WES TYLER, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
